title: ajuga forrestii
intro: Ajuga forrestii, also known as Himalayan bugle, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, Ajuga forrestii has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Ajuga forrestii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
